title: HAPPY VALLEY PARKS AND RECREATION - 211info
text: CITY OF HAPPY VALLEY HAPPY VALLEY PARKS AND RECREATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides various recreation opportunities such as youth sports (such as soccer and basketball), adult and youth fitness classes, crafts, and community-based recreation. Operates and maintains parkland, including natural areas and hiking trails. 16000 SE Misty Drive Happy Valley, OR 97086 Eligibility: Unrestricted. Activities and classes are available for all ages, with special programs for ages 3-13 Hours: Varies by activity. Visit website for the event calendar. Email (503) 783-3800 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 783-3800 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for more information FEES: Varies by service; income-based scholarships are available DOCUMENTS: Proof of income if applying for scholarship AREA SERVED: City of Happy Valley SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located off SE 162nd and Sunnyside Road. TriMet bus 155. Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Public Parks Youth Enrichment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - CITY OF HAPPY VALLEY LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - SUMMER CAMPS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
